#  Start Your Interview Prep in Consulting and Finance! 
Are you aiming for a career at top firms like **McKinsey, BCG, or Goldman Sachs**? Then get ready for a challenging application process!
At PrepLounge, the world’s number one platform for case interview preparation, you'll find everything you need for **perfect preparation** : practice cases, drills, mental math, and plenty of insights, tips, and tricks.
Join our community of over **558,000 like-minded peers**! 🚀

##  Spencer Stuart Alumni Network 
The Alumni Network brings together all those who have given their time and talent to our firm over the years. The network offers a meaningful way for alumni to connect with one another, stay up to date on Spencer Stuart news and advance their professional growth.

## Board Governance Trends 
[![](https://www.spencerstuart.com/-/media/2025/10/lessons-from-directors/thmb-lessonsdirectorsactivistinvestor-oct20.jpg)](https://www.spencerstuart.com/research-and-insight/lessons-from-directors-how-boards-can-prepare-for-activist-investors)
##  [Lessons from Directors: How Boards Can Prepare for Activist Investors](https://www.spencerstuart.com/research-and-insight/lessons-from-directors-how-boards-can-prepare-for-activist-investors)
What is the best way for a board to prepare for an activist investor situation? More than 175 board directors shared their answers to this question. 
[![](https://www.spencerstuart.com/-/media/2019/november/batw_newhdr.jpg)](https://www.spencerstuart.com/research-and-insight/boards-around-the-world)
##  [Boards Around the World](https://www.spencerstuart.com/research-and-insight/boards-around-the-world)
An interactive exploration of how boards around the world compare in terms of diversity, composition, compensation and more. 
[![](https://www.spencerstuart.com/-/media/2025/10/chros-on-boards/thmb-chrolandingpage-oct2025-616x434.jpg)](https://www.spencerstuart.com/research-and-insight/the-missing-voice-the-rise-of-chros-on-boards)
##  [The Missing Voice: The Rise of CHROs on Boards](https://www.spencerstuart.com/research-and-insight/the-missing-voice-the-rise-of-chros-on-boards)
We profile several CHROs who have served on boards, to look at the outsized impact they can have on the board’s governance.
